positives: No cancellation in 4 of 5 policy years (2020, 2021, 2023, 2024)
Continuous commercial insurance coverage maintained over the full 5-year period without gaps
Claim frequency declined sharply in 2022 (4 claims), demonstrating potential responsiveness to loss control
All carriers are recognized national or specialty insurers (Nationwide, Berkshire Hathaway Guard, Zurich, CNA Financial)
Premium levels have remained relatively stable over 5 years ($1.37M–$1.63M range)
concerns: Policy cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022 — reason not disclosed
Elevated claim count in 2021 (15 claims), the highest in the 5-year window
Claim count resurging in 2023 (10) and 2024 (13) after the 2022 low of 4
Four different carriers over five years indicates potential market instability or underwriting concerns
Loss ratios not provided for any policy year — limits underwriting assessment
48 total claims across all lines over 5 years represents meaningful frequency exposure
No breakdown of claims by line of coverage or severity provided
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 5-year prior insurance history (2020–2024) covering Workers Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Auto, and Commercial Property. Total of 48 claims recorded across all years and lines. Annual claim counts: 2020 — 6; 2021 — 15; 2022 — 4; 2023 — 10; 2024 — 13. Aggregate program premiums: 2020 — $1,581,292.51; 2021 — $1,487,006.51; 2022 — $1,369,245.71; 2023 — $1,476,849.96; 2024 — $1,634,721.63. One mid-term or non-renewal cancellation occurred in 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group). Loss ratios, claim severities, and per-line claim breakdowns not reported.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 48 total claims reported over 5 policy years across all lines of coverage. Breakdown by year: 2020 (CNA Financial) — 6 claims; 2021 (Nationwide Insurance) — 15 claims (5-year high); 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group) — 4 claims (5-year low), policy subsequently cancelled; 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard) — 10 claims; 2024 (Nationwide Insurance) — 13 claims. No loss ratio, reserve, or paid/incurred data provided. Claim counts do not distinguish between lines of coverage.
